title: Legend of Martial Immortal Episode 9 Subtitle Indonesia, English
description:
Ditendang keluar oleh sekte? Dihina oleh sesama murid? Dan dicampakkan oleh kekasih sendiri? Tak satu pun dari mereka bisa menghentikanku! Bahkan jika Dantian-ku rusak. Aku pasti akan mencapai mencapai puncak dan menjadi Martial Immortal!

Eng

Kicked out by the sect? Despised by fellow disciples? And was dumped by one's own lover? None of them can stop me! Even if my dantian is broken. I will definitely reach the top and become a Martial Immortal!

Legend of Martial Immortal Subtitle indonesia, english, portuguese, turkish, spanish, italian, polish, arabic, thai, german
